world.title: Bop Operations
world.description: Intermediate and advanced mission design with doors, keys, pits, diamonds, and vault logistics.
world.story_intro: Plan routes, manage inventory, and solve larger open arenas with multiple objectives.

levels.title: Gate Warmup
levels.description: Grab a key, unlock the door, and reach the finish.
levels.hint: Pick up the key first. A locked door consumes one key when you step onto it.
levels.tutorial:
# Welcome to Bop Operations!

This world introduces new tile types that require planning ahead.

## Keys and Doors

You'll see **key tiles** and **locked doors** on the grid.

- Stand on a key tile and call `grab()` to pick it up
- When you step onto a locked door, one key is automatically consumed to open it
- If you don't have a key, you can't pass through the door

## How it works

```
move("right")
move("right")
grab()          // pick up the key
move("right")
move("right")   // door opens automatically
```

Any key opens any door — you don't need to match them.

## Your mission

Grab the key, walk through the locked door, and reach the goal.

---

Click the **Puzzle** tab at the top to see the grid and start solving!

levels.title: Relay Access
levels.description: Unlock one gate to reach a second key, then open the final gate.
levels.hint: Collect the keys in the right order.
levels.tutorial:
# Multi-door Planning

This level has multiple doors and multiple keys. Each door consumes one key when you walk through it, so the **order** you collect keys and open doors matters.

## Key management

- You can carry multiple keys at once
- Each door uses up exactly one key
- If you open a door before picking up a key you need later, you might get stuck

## Planning your route

Before writing code, look at the grid and figure out:

1. Where are the keys?
2. Where are the doors?
3. What order should you collect and use them?

## Your mission

Navigate through multiple locked doors by collecting keys in the right order. Reach the goal!

levels.title: Pit Scout
levels.description: Use a safe route around pits in a larger open arena.
levels.hint: Pits are walkable in path checks but fatal on entry. Consider checking `pit_ahead()` before moving.
levels.tutorial:
# Pit Safety

Some tiles are **pits**. If your bot steps onto a pit, it falls in and the simulation ends!

## The `pit_ahead()` sensor

| Sensor | Returns `true` when... |
|---|---|
| `pit_ahead()` | The tile ahead (in facing direction) is a pit |

Use `pit_ahead()` to check before moving:

```
if !pit_ahead() {
    move("right")
}
```

## A tricky detail

`path_ahead()` returns `true` for pit tiles because they're technically walkable — the bot just won't survive! So use `pit_ahead()` as an extra safety check.

## Your mission

Navigate around the pits to reach the goal. Plan a safe route!

levels.title: Safe Crossing
levels.description: Collect a key, cross a gated chokepoint, and avoid the pit lane.
levels.hint: Look for repeating patterns to save on instructions.
levels.tutorial:
# Route Discipline

This level combines keys, doors, and pits. You'll need to plan a safe route and keep your code efficient.

## Using loops for navigation

When your path has repeating sections, use loops instead of writing each move by hand:

```
repeat 3 {
    move("down")
}
grab()
repeat 2 {
    move("right")
}
```

## Combining mechanics

You might need to:
1. Navigate around pits to reach a key
2. Pick up the key with `grab()`
3. Route to the locked door
4. Reach the goal

Look for patterns in each section to keep your instruction count low.

## Your mission

Collect the key, unlock the door, avoid the pits, and reach the goal.

levels.title: Diamond Delivery
levels.description: Collect a diamond, deposit it in a diamond vault, then finish.
levels.hint: `drop()` deposits only one item at a time.
levels.tutorial:
# Diamond Vaults

Diamonds are a new collectible. Like gems, you pick them up with `grab()`.

## The `drop()` function

`drop()` is a new command. It deposits one item from your inventory into a vault.

- **Diamond vaults** accept diamonds
- Stand on the vault tile and call `drop()` to deposit
- Each `drop()` deposits one item, so call it multiple times if you're carrying more

## Example

```
move("right")
grab()          // pick up diamond
move("right")
move("right")
drop()          // deposit at vault
```

## Your mission

Collect the diamond, deposit it at the diamond vault, and reach the goal.

levels.title: Double Diamond Circuit
levels.description: Collect two diamonds, deposit both, then route to the finish.
levels.hint: You can carry multiple diamonds. Deposit each one with `drop()`.
levels.tutorial:
# Inventory and Drop-off

You can carry multiple diamonds at once. This lets you plan more efficient routes.

## Batching pickups

Instead of collecting one diamond, depositing it, then going back for the next one, try collecting several before making a trip to the vault:

```
// collect first diamond
move("right")
grab()
// collect second diamond
move("right")
grab()
// go to vault and deposit both
move("down")
drop()
drop()
```

Each `drop()` deposits one diamond. Call it once per diamond you're carrying.

## Your mission

Collect both diamonds, deposit them at the vault, and reach the goal. Plan your route to minimise backtracking!

levels.title: Gem Bank
levels.description: Collect gems, deposit them in a gem vault, and then finish.
levels.hint: Deposit all held gems at the vault before heading to the goal.
levels.tutorial:
# Gem Vaults

Gem vaults work just like diamond vaults, but for gems.

## Depositing gems

Stand on the gem vault and call `drop()` to deposit one gem at a time:

```
// collect gems
grab()
move("right")
grab()
// go to vault
move("down")
drop()
drop()
```

## Completion objective

This level requires you to deposit **all** gems. That means:

- No gems left on the grid
- No gems left in your inventory
- Everything deposited at the vault

## Your mission

Collect all the gems, deposit them at the gem vault, and reach the goal.

levels.title: Mixed Cargo
levels.description: Collect both gems and diamonds, deposit each at the correct vault, then finish.
levels.hint: You can hold gems and diamonds at the same time. Use tile_type() to detect gem and diamond vaults if needed.
levels.tutorial:
# Mixed Cargo

This level has **both** gems and diamonds, each with their own vault. You need to deposit each item at the correct vault type.

## Two vault types

| Vault | Accepts |
|---|---|
| Gem vault | Gems |
| Diamond vault | Diamonds |

`drop()` automatically deposits the right item when you're standing on the matching vault.

## The `tile_type()` sensor

If you need to check what kind of tile you're standing on:

```
if tile_type() == "gem_vault" {
    drop()
}
```

`tile_type()` returns strings like `"gem_vault"`, `"diamond_vault"`, `"floor"`, etc.

## Strategy

In larger maps, it's often more efficient to batch your work: collect several items, then deposit them, rather than going back and forth.

## Your mission

Collect all gems and diamonds, deposit each at the correct vault, and reach the goal.

levels.title: Avoid the Pits
levels.description: Unlock the sector gate, collect the gem, and return to finish.
levels.hint: Use the safe lower lane to approach the door from the left side.
levels.tutorial:
# Combining Pits, Keys, and Gems

This level brings together several mechanics. You'll need to navigate pits, unlock a door, and collect a gem.

## Planning complex routes

When a level has multiple mechanics, break it into steps:

1. **Survey the grid** — where are the keys, doors, pits, and collectibles?
2. **Plan the order** — what do you need to pick up first?
3. **Find safe paths** — which routes avoid pits?
4. **Write the code** — one section at a time

## Your mission

Grab the key, unlock the door, collect the gem, and reach the goal — all while avoiding the pits.

levels.title: Cargo Lock
levels.description: Bring two diamonds through a gate and deposit them before finishing.
levels.hint: Use loops to write more efficient code
levels.tutorial:
# Throughput Planning

Bigger maps often have distinct **sectors** separated by walls or doors. Crossing between sectors costs steps, so planning an efficient route pays off.

## Thinking about efficiency

Try to finish everything you need in one area before moving to the next. Ask yourself:

- Can I collect all items in this sector before leaving?
- What's the shortest path to the vault after collecting?
- Do I need to save a key for a door I haven't reached yet?

## Using loops

If you spot repeating patterns in your route, loops can save instructions:

```
repeat 4 {
    move("down")
}
grab()
repeat 3 {
    move("right")
}
```

## Your mission

Collect the diamonds, deposit them at the vault, and reach the goal. Plan your route through the sectors carefully!

levels.title: Operations Maze
levels.description: A single maze-style mission with mixed logistics and a gated crossing.
levels.hint: Plan your route to minimize backtracking. Consider the order of operations for picking up and dropping items.
levels.tutorial:
# Mixed Constraints

This is a maze-style level that combines everything you've learned: keys, doors, gems, diamonds, vaults, and pits.

## Your toolbox

| Command | What it does |
|---|---|
| `grab()` | Pick up item on current tile (key, gem, or diamond) |
| `drop()` | Deposit one item at the matching vault |
| `move(dir)` | Move one tile in a direction |

## Sensors

| Sensor | Returns |
|---|---|
| `gem_here()` | `true` if there's a gem on your tile |
| `diamond_here()` | `true` if there's a diamond on your tile |
| `key_here()` | `true` if there's a key on your tile |
| `pit_ahead()` | `true` if the tile ahead is a pit |
| `tile_type()` | The type of your current tile as a string |

## Your mission

Collect all gems and diamonds, deposit each at the correct vault, and reach the goal. Watch out for pits and locked doors!

levels.title: Operations Finale
levels.description: Use keys, gems, and diamonds to complete the final objectives.
levels.hint: Be careful which doors you use.
levels.tutorial:
# Operations Finale

This is the biggest challenge in the course. Every mechanic is in play: keys, doors, pits, gems, diamonds, and both vault types.

## Strategy tips

1. **Study the grid first** — trace possible routes before writing any code
2. **Count your keys** — there are multiple doors, and using a key on the wrong door can lock you out
3. **Plan your deposit trips** — collect items efficiently, then deposit at the right vaults
4. **Watch for pits** — some paths that look short lead through pits

## Key conservation

This level has more doors than keys in some sections. If you use a key early on a door you didn't need to open, you might not be able to reach a required area later. Think carefully about which doors to unlock.

## Your mission

Collect all gems and diamonds, deposit everything at the correct vaults, and reach the goal. Good luck!
